title: ServiceNow Catalog Request
description: A ServiceNow service catalog request record representing a user's request for one or more catalog items through the self-service portal.

sys_id.description: The unique 32-character system identifier for the request.

number.description: The human-readable request number, prefixed with REQ.

request_state.description: The current state of the request.

stage.description: The current stage of the request in the fulfillment workflow.

requested_for.description: The user for whom the catalog items were requested.

opened_by.description: The user who submitted the request.

opened_at.description: The date and time the request was submitted.

delivery_address.description: The delivery address for physical items.

special_instructions.description: Special instructions provided by the requester.

price.description: The total price for all requested items.

approval.description: The current approval status of the request.

requested_items.description: The line items in this request.

active.description: Whether the request is still active.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time the record was created.

sys_created_by.description: The user who created the record.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time the record was last updated.

sys_updated_by.description: The user who last updated the record.

ReferenceField.description: A ServiceNow reference field that can be a sys_id string or an object containing a link and value.

link.description: The API URL to the referenced record.

value.description: The sys_id of the referenced record.

display_value.description: The display value of the referenced record.

RequestedItem.description: A requested catalog item within a service catalog request.

sys_id.description: Unique identifier for the requested item.

number.description: The requested item number, prefixed with RITM.

cat_item.description: The catalog item that was requested.

state.description: The current state of the requested item.

assigned_to.description: The user assigned to fulfill the item.

configuration_item.description: The configuration item associated with the request.
